mapper.update: UPDATE t_tool_registry SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tool_type = #{toolType}, schema_json = #{schemaJson}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, auth_config = #{authConfig}, require_approval = #{requireApproval}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE t_tool_registry SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tool_type = #{toolType}, schema_json = #{schemaJson}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, auth_config = #{authConfig}, require_approval = #{requireApproval}, version = #{version}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_tool_registry SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, name, description, tool_type, schema_json, endpoint, auth_config, require_approval, status, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, name, description, tool_type, schema_json, endpoint, auth_config, require_approval, status, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, name, description, tool_type, schema_json, endpoint, auth_config, require_approval, status, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND tool_type = #{toolType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND tool_type = #{toolType} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, tool_id, name, description, tool_type, schema_json, endpoint, auth_config, require_approval, status, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_tool_registry WHERE tool_type = #{toolType} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
